urdu transliteration text:
Akhri raat sakina kiBibi Sakina’s Last Night English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Me khaak pa sojaungi  ha kehti hu(n) baba,Sine pe sulane ko kaha kehti hu(n) baba
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I will sleep on the dusty ground, Baba
I will not ask to sleep on your chest, Baba

urdu transliteration text:
Please show me your face, Baba,
Please come before I die, Baba,
Kehti hu(n) ke chehra hi dikhajayiye babaMarne se mere pehle hi aajayiye babaPehlu me chhupane ko kaha keti hu(n) baba
@HujjatELC
english translation text: I am not asking you to take me in your arms, Baba

They tend to complain about any difficulty that befalls them, Baba
But I will not ask you to pamper me, Baba,

urdu transliteration text:
Sehlungi jo haathon ki lakiron me likha haiZindaan ki andheron ka gila kisne kiya haiMe shamme jalane ko kaha kehti hu(n) baba
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I will face whatever is in my destiny, Baba,
I will not complain about the darkness of the prison, Baba
I will not ask for candles to be lit in the prison, Baba

urdu transliteration text:
Haaye baba, baba mere bachpan ka taqaza to nahi thaKhabon me khilone the janaza to nahi thaGhodi me khilane ko kaha kehti hu(n) baba
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Father, it is unusual for children my age,
To see the bodies of their loved ones, instead of playing with their toys,
I am not asking you to play with me in your lap, Baba

O Father, who will heal my wounds,
I am not asking you to take me in your arms, Baba
